creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 203311
itamae-1.10.3.patch

RubyGem Itamae has been updated to 1.10.3.
Since 1.10, new syntax `only_if` and `not_if` inside `define` block has been
supported. Minor updates include bug fixes.

The attached patch upgrades sysutils/rubygem-itamae port to 1.10.3.
Please apply to Ports Tree.
